data.content: Plan for two-phase Create New dialog: after create, show Groom→Take panel. Reuse stale-beat-grooming reviews pipeline (POST/GET /api/beats/stale-grooming/reviews accepts arbitrary targets) to groom the new beat and poll its jobId for completed/failed; Take (startSession) enabled only on status=completed, blocked on failed/pending. New files: src/lib/grooming-status.ts (pure deriveGroomingStatus — test seam), src/lib/use-beat-grooming.ts (poll hook), src/components/create-beat-post-actions.tsx (panel); extract startBeatSession helper shared with useShipBeat for Take parity; edit create-beat-dialog.tsx to add post-create phase. Reuse canTakeBeat; no workflow-state string checks; surface grooming/agent errors loudly. Tests: pure grooming-status unit tests + sequence-guard + storybook states.
